strategy: Attack with Storm; he takes +30% from it and resists Myth 36%, everything else only 6%.
Round 1 Blinding Light lowers your accuracy, so bring accuracy enchants or Sniper to avoid fizzles.
From round 2 he carries Guardian Spirit, a full-health revive after the first defeat. Plan to kill him twice.
Break his shields before hitting. Starting round 2 and every three rounds he casts Legion Shield on himself.
Stack blades, pop the Legion Shield, hit once, then set up again and kill him a second time after the Guardian Spirit revive.
cheatNotes: Round 1 he interrupt-casts Blinding Light, dropping your accuracy. Bring accuracy enchants or Sniper to avoid fizzles.
Round 2 he gives himself a Star Guardian Spirit, a full-health revive after the first defeat. Expect to kill him twice.
Starting round 2 and every three rounds he casts Legion Shield. Pop the shields before your hit.
